items.title: Union Health Ministry brings pregabalin under Schedule H1 to prevent misuse
items.summary: ‘The decision has been taken in view of reports received from certain states regarding the misuse and abuse of Pregabalin, particularly among youth,’ Union Health Ministry said

items.title: Why Islamophobic, Antisemitic and Racist Crimes Are Rising in the UK
items.summary: Islamophobic, antisemitic and racist crimes are being fueled by online disinformation, global instability and divisive political rhetoric, experts say.
